scripts.test:coverage: rimraf coverage && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts --coverage && mkdir -p coverage/raw && cp coverage/unit/coverage-final.json coverage/raw/unit.json && VITE_COVERAGE=true playwright test -c test/browser/playwright.config.ts && nyc merge coverage/raw coverage/coverage.json && nyc report --temp-dir coverage --report-dir coverage/report --reporter=text --reporter=html --reporter=lcov
